docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,784.14 FILED BY MCLAUGHLIN, MARTIN MOSBACHER, EMILY AS TO DEFENDANT 376-380 GREEN ST, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED SEP-11-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 376-380 GREEN ST, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLA MORISI-VALDES MANAGING MEMBER FILED BY DEFENDANT 376-380 GREEN ST, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2025 BY CHRISTOPHER C. HITE. PLAINTIFF MARTIN MCLAUGHLIN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EMILY MOSBACHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 376-380 GREEN STREET ST., LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLA MORESI-VALDES, MANAGING MEMBER. DEFENDANT'S WITNESSES: VINCENT ETCHEBER AND MABLE SAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER C. HITE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN, MARTIN MOSBACHER, EMILY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 376-380 GREEN ST, LLC $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, PLAINTIFFS HAVE MET THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF FOR A SPECIFIC PERIOD OF TIME AND TO A PARTICULAR ROOM, AS WELL AS, PERISHABLE ITEMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
